_about: Diverse, hand-labeled Q&A relevance sample for the same-universe image relevance gate. Each item is a realistic personality-quiz Q&A string (question stem or answer option) drawn from the breadth of the app's topic universe (see personality_only CSV: 1000+ types across animals, food, defenses/strategy, geology, instruments, MBTI, alignments, trades, vehicles...). Label `should_generate` = the GROUND TRUTH from the owner's rule: route to same-universe FAL generation ONLY when the string names a concrete, depictable, universe-anchored subject (a thing/scene/character you could draw and that is logically tied to the quiz topic). Abstract personality/preference/feeling prompts MUST fall back to the $0 generic icon (or no image), never burning FAL budget on a weak off-topic picture. `kind` is question|answer. `topic` is the quiz universe the string would appear under.
